Who We Are

Refined Supply.
Indian Roots.

Jayexim is a Vadodara-based international supply company with two focused product divisions — industrial packaging solutions and premium millet-based nutrition. We supply export-grade products to global buyers with full quality control and dependable communication at every step.

Our Position

Selected Categories.
Global Execution.

Our approach is deliberately focused. We have built deep supply capability in two areas where Indian quality and pricing offer genuine global advantage.

Every product is sampled before commitment. Every shipment leaves with complete documentation. Every enquiry is answered within 24 hours.

We operate for international buyers who value reliability — and who expect their supply partner to perform professionally at every step.

This consistency is not a selling point. It is our operating standard.

01
Quality Consistency

The sample you approve is the product that ships — no substitution, no quality drift between orders.

02
Transparent Pricing

Competitive, clear, and honest. Our pricing reflects the quality we supply — no hidden margins.

03
Long-Term Supply

Our buyers return because we perform consistently, season after season. We are built for long-term relationships.

Our Two Divisions

Two Categories.
One Partner.

01
Jayexim Industrial

Export-grade packaging tape, stretch film, and corrugated solutions — engineered for logistics, manufacturing, and e-commerce markets globally.

02
Jayexim Foods

Premium millet-based nutrition — snack bars, breakfast range, and retail snacks for health-conscious global markets.

03
Direct. No Layers.

You deal with Jayexim directly — clear communication, faster decisions, better pricing. Always.

04
Vadodara, Gujarat

Located in India's industrial heartland — access to premium raw materials and established supply infrastructure.

Our Capability

Global
Capability

What We Deliver

Every Step,
Handled Well.

◈
Export Coordination

End-to-end shipment management from production readiness to port dispatch — coordinated with full transparency.

◈
Private Label Support

Custom branding, packaging formats, and label specifications available across both supply divisions.

◈
Complete Documentation

Commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin — all export paperwork handled from our side.

◈
Quality Assurance

Every product quality-checked before dispatch. Sample approval mandatory before any bulk shipment.

◈
Shipment Flexibility

Sea freight, air cargo, or express courier — logistics coordinated to your port or door globally.

◈
Dependable Communication

Every enquiry answered within 24 hours. Every order status communicated proactively — always.

How We Work

From Enquiry
to Delivery

1
Share Requirement

Product, quantity, destination, timeline — via WhatsApp, email, or LinkedIn.

2
Receive Quote

Full FOB or CIF pricing with complete cost breakdown within 24–48 hours.

3
Sample Approval

Product samples dispatched for your approval before any bulk order.

4
Shipment

Quality check, documentation, and coordinated shipping until your cargo arrives.

The India Advantage

Why Source
from India?

India offers exceptional product quality, competitive pricing, and deeply established export infrastructure. Our location in Gujarat places us at the heart of India's industrial and agricultural supply base.

#1
India is the world's largest millet producer — our food range draws from its finest growing regions
40%
Lower packaging costs vs Western alternatives with comparable or superior quality
100+
Countries importing from India — a proven, trusted global supply base
Fast
Competitive lead times to GCC, Europe, Southeast Asia, and North America
